name_en: 🎉Fluffy Hobo🎉 This fluffy Hobo bag is a fall and winter bestseller 👏, you can feel its softness even through the screen 😘, it makes you want to hug it immediately 🙊🙊, it's so cute. It looks good and is super spacious, incredibly convenient 👍. Can be carried by hand or as an underarm bag, looks great 😘. A winter essential. If you like it, grab one now! 🎉🎉 Model: 1NE515, Size: 23L x 14H x 5B cm
